name: Gomu Gomu no Pistol
description: His standard attack, Luffy hits his opponent with an elastic punch at both long and short range.

name: Gomu Gomu no Rocket
description: He holds on to an object, stretches his arms out as far as possible, then hurls himself at enemies at full speed. Very useful for covering long distances quickly.

name: Gomu Gomu no Muchi
description: He kicks with his leg in a circular motion, stretching it out to sweep away dozens of enemies at once.

name: Gomu Gomu no Tonkachi
description: He wraps his limbs around his enemy, throwing him to the ground while uncoiling his limbs to spin him around.

name: Gomu Gomu no Fuusen
description: A defensive technique, it inflates its body like a balloon, enabling it to deflect certain projectiles like cannonballs.

name: Gomu Gomu no Kama
description: He stretches out his arms to the sides and lunges at his enemies, mowing down dozens in the process.

name: Gomu Gomu no Gatling Gun
description: He throws a flurry of punches at his enemy at impressive speed, giving the impression that he has several arms.

name: Gomu Gomu no Bulet
description: He stretches his arm far back, then brings it forward to deliver a short-range punch.

name: Gomu Gomu no Yari
description: He joins his toes and stretches his legs like a spear to strike his enemy.

name: Gomu Gomu no Kane
description: He holds on to his foe, stretches his neck backwards and then throws it forward to deliver a skull blow to his opponent.

name: Gomu Gomu no Bazooka
description: He first stretches both arms backwards as far as possible before striking his opponent with as much force as possible using the palms of both hands, which generally throws the opponent far away.

name: Gomu Gomu no Ono
description: He stretches his leg vertically and brings it down to crush his target. This attack is so powerful that even ships and buildings can shatter on impact.

name: Gomu Gomu no Kazagurama
description: Firmly anchored on his legs, he rolls up on himself, grabs a large object or an enemy and unrolls at full speed to hit all opponents around him (without differentiating between friend and foe).

name: Gomu Gomu no Tate
description: He places the palm of his hand towards his opponent, stretches his fingers and blocks the enemy's attack.

name: Gomu Gomu no Ami
description: He stretches out his arms and fingers to form a giant net in which he traps his opponent, or cannonballs. Then he spins around, bringing his arms and fingers back to him, causing whatever he's trapped in his net to fall to the ground.

name: Gomu Gomu no Ikebana
description: He tore off his ship's mast and planted it in Laboon's still fresh wound.

name: Gomu Gomu no Stamp
description: He throws his foot straight at his enemy, striking him in the face with the sole of his foot.

name: Gomu Gomu no Bowgun
description: He holds on to his opponent, wrapping himself upwards and placing his feet level with his enemy's waist. He unrolls himself, throwing his opponent into the air.

name: Gomu Gomu no Dameda
description: He uses this technique to prevent someone from taking what belongs to him.

name: Gomu Gomu no Baku Baku
description: He swells his mouth and bites the enemy.

name: Gomu Gomu no Marunokogiri
description: He stretches out his arms, grabs his opponent and propels himself towards him, spinning like a circular saw.

name: Gomu Gomu no Shotgun
description: He first performs a Gomu Gomu no Pistol, then "vibrates" his arm, giving the illusion that he's hitting his opponent several times at once.

name: Gomu Gomu no Storm
description: He inflates himself with the Gomu Gomu no Fuusen and winds himself wide, then expels all his air to the ground as he uncoils. This enables him to take to the air and deliver a flurry of punches as he whirls around.

name: Gomu Gomu no Hanabi
description: He delivers a flurry of punches and kicks to his enemy, giving the impression of seeing dozens of fists and feet.

name: Gomu Gomu no Bohhh
description: He empties his mind and unconsciously dodges all his opponent's attacks, but can't counter-attack as he thinks of nothing.

name: Gomu Gomu no Tako
description: Same as the Gomu Gomu no Bohhh except that this time all its limbs are soft, but this allows it to perform an attack, the Gomu Gomu no Tako Hanabi.

name: Gomu Gomu no Tako Hanabi
description: He hits the scenery in front of him, and his opponent catches the ricochets of his previous shots.

name: Gomu Gomu no Rifle
description: He stretches his arm back and wraps it around himself to deliver a devastating punch as he uncoils it.

name: Gomu Gomu no Golden Rifle
description: He stretches his arm, trapped in a golden sphere, backwards, and wraps it around himself to deliver a devastating punch as he uncoils it.

name: Gomu Gomu no Hook
description: He delivers a powerful hook to his enemy.

name: Gomu Gomu no Flail
description: He spins one of his arms above him, then brings it down on his enemy.

name: Gomu Gomu no Cannon
description: He warms up with a flurry of punches in the air, then joins both arms to throw them forward at the enemy.

name: Gomu Gomu no Volcano
description: He throws his leg into the air, finally destroying the building he's standing in like a volcanic eruption.

name: Gomu Gomu no Ame
description: He leaps over his enemies to land a flurry of punches.

name: Gomu Gomu no Stamp Gatling
description: He throws a flurry of kicks at his enemy at impressive speed, giving the impression that he has several feet. This technique was used against Aokiji, Kizaru and Akainu at the same time during the Battle of Marineford.

name: Gomu Gomu no Snake Shot
description: He half-opens his hand, phalanges forward, as if reaching for something. He then stretches out his arm, undulating and charging at the enemy like a snake attacking its target, finally hitting it with his fingertips.

name: Gomu Gomu no Sei Ken Teki
description: Luffy delivers a powerful punch, at the same time as the Kung-Fu Dugong he's fighting.

name: Mizu Mizu no Pistol
description: Luffy spits water in his "Aqua Luffy" form.

name: Gomu Gomu no Hanabi Ougon Botan
description: He delivers a flurry of punches, trapping the latter in a golden sphere. This technique is used to destroy the lightning cloud created by Ener.

name: Gomu Gomu no Ougon RIfle
description: He coils his arm and then delivers a punch, which is trapped in a golden sphere, to his opponent as he uncoils it. This technique is used to defeat Ener.

name: Gomu Gomu no Champion Rifle
description: He performs a Gomu Gomu no Rifle with his arm equipped with Mr 3's wax armor. This technique is used against Magellan.

name: Gomu Gomu no Champion Gatling Gun
description: He performs a Gomu Gomu no Gatling Gun with his arm equipped with Mr 3's wax armor. This technique is used against Magellan.

name: Gomu Gomu no Champion Bazooka
description: He performs a Gomu Gomu no Bazooka with his arm equipped with Mr 3's wax armor. This technique is used against Magellan.

name: Gomu Gomu no Champion Stamp
description: He performs a Gomu Gomu no Stamp with his arm equipped with Mr 3's wax armor. This technique is used against Magellan.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Migawari
description: He uses Baggy as protection against attacks involving bladed weapons. This technique is used against Mihawk.

name: Gomu Gomu no Pachinko
description: Luffy plants his feet in the ground, tucks his head between his shoulders and uses his arms to project an object like a slingshot. This technique is used against Foxy's crew.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Pistol
description: faster and more powerful.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 2 / Gear Second
luffy_gear.description: It's a technique that improves power and speed in combat by increasing blood pressure, by positioning the body as shown in the image, which is normally impossible for a normal human, as the body can't withstand that much blood pressure. But since Luffy's body is made of rubber, he can handle the pressure.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Rifle
description: faster and more powerful.

description: a thousand times faster and more powerful. This attack gives the impression that Luffy is leaving both arms behind as he runs towards his opponent just after throwing his arms back.

description: Luffy delivers a super-powerful and extremely fast back-kick

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Mace
description: (with both arms at the same time) lightning-fast. This attack is effective enough to leave the mark of both fists on the opponent.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Hammer
description: He sends his opponent to the ground by grabbing him by the feet.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Gatling Gun
description: Luffy's ultimate attack in Gear 2: a burst of Chewing Jet Pistol that often leaves the opponent no time to counterattack.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 2 / Gear Second
luffy_gear.description: It's a technique that improves power and speed in combat by increasing blood pressure, by positioning the body as shown in the image, which is normally impossible for a normal human, as the body can't withstand that much blood pressure. name: Gomu Gomu No Jet Tonkachi
description: faster and more powerful.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 2 / Gear Second
luffy_gear.description: It's a technique that improves power and speed in combat by increasing blood pressure, by positioning the body as shown in the image, which is normally impossible for a normal human, as the body can't withstand that much blood pressure. But since Luffy's body is made of rubber, he can handle the pressure.

name: Gomu Gomu no Gigant Pistol
translation: Chewing Punch Géant / Gum-Gum Gigant pistol
description: The attack is fairly slow, but its destructive effect is gigantic.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 3 / Gear Third
luffy_gear.description: This technique greatly enhances Luffy's fighting power. To activate it, he bites down on his thumb and blows into it. The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Gigant Ono
description: This is one of Gear 3's most devastating attacks, allowing Luffy to severely damage a ship containing 500 Navy soldiers.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 3 / Gear Third
luffy_gear.description: This technique greatly enhances Luffy's fighting power. To activate it, he bites down on his thumb and blows into it. The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Gigant Bazooka
description: Luffy swells his two fists to attack: it's with this technique that he defeats Oars, the most powerful zombie of the great corsair Gecko Moria.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 3 / Gear Third
luffy_gear.description: This technique greatly enhances Luffy's fighting power. To activate it, he bites down on his thumb and blows into it. The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Gigant Rifle
description: Luffy gains height and executes a giant Chewing Spin to finish off his opponent.

The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Gigant Fuusen
description: A much bigger Chewing Balloon.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 3 / Gear Third
luffy_gear.description: This technique greatly enhances Luffy's fighting power. To activate it, he bites down on his thumb and blows into it. The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Giant Thor Axe
description: Luffy inflates his leg and foot and lifts them high into the electricity-filled clouds, then lowers them with force and speed onto his opponent. Technique used to defeat Shiki the Golden Lion in the film Strong World.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 3 / Gear Third
luffy_gear.description: This technique greatly enhances Luffy's fighting power. To activate it, he bites down on his thumb and blows into it. The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Snake Shot
description: Luffy throws his arm at his opponent, making him undulate like a snake, hence the name, and strikes him with his fingers. First used against Hody Jones.

name: Gomu Gomu no Thank You Fire
description: This technique precisely returns the projectile to the sender with twice the power. Luffy forms a square with the thumb and forefinger of both hands to create a sight and aim at the target. This technique is used against the Yeti Cool Brothers.

name: Gomu Gomu no Soucoupe Volante
description: Luffy twirls his legs to attack his enemies and seems able to fly. This technique amuses Usopp.

name: Gomu Gomu no Tako Stamp
description: Luffy uses Weapon's Haki on both legs and sends a flurry of kicks similar to "Gomu Gomu no stamp gatling".

name: Gomu Gomu no Eagle Bazooka
description: Luffy does his Gomu Gomu no Jet Bazooka technique again, but with the Offensive Fluid on both arms to create a more powerful attack.

name: Gomu Gomu no Spring Bullet
description: Luffy picks up speed by bouncing with the offensive fluid, then lunges towards his opponent with a reinforced punch.

name: Gomu Gomu no Tsuppari
description: Sumo technique that consists in using the palms of the hands to knock the opponent backwards.

name: Gomu Gomu no Red Hawk
description: After switching his arm to Gear 2, Luffy strengthens it with the Offensive Fluid and strikes his opponent with full force, even creating flames.

But since Luffy's body is made of rubber, he can handle the pressure.

name: Gomu Gomu no Giant Jet Lance
description: A giant Gear 2 move thanks to Lily the giant with feet.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Mace

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Gatling
description: in Gear 2, Luffy uses Weapon Fluid with a super-powered Jet Rafale.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Spear

name: Gomu Gomu no Eléphant Gun
description: Luffy switches his arm to Gear 3, strengthens it with Offensive Fluid and delivers a gigantic punch to his opponent.

name: Gomu Gomu no Eléphant Gatling
description: Luffy switches both arms to Gear 3, reinforces it with Weapon's Haki and delivers a series of gigantic punches to his opponent.

The exhaled air spreads throughout his arm, allowing him to inflate his arm like a balloon, making it as big as a giant's arm. He can also use it with other parts of his body (notably his stomach or his foot). Once again, only Luffy can use this technique.

name: Gomu Gomu no Kong Gun
description: Luffy retracts his fists into his arm like a spring before letting go.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no Rhino Schneider
description: Luffy retracts his feet into his legs like a spring before letting go.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no Culverin
description: Luffy sends out his fist, changing its trajectory once launched to hit its target.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no Leo Bazooka
description: Luffy uses a technique similar to the Jet Bazooka, but he uses his hands as if he were going to use a "Kaméhaméha".

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no King Kong Gun
description: Luffy, while in Gear Fourth, uses Gear Third to inflate his arm, making him much more powerful and massive than before.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no Kong Organ
description: This attack is similar to the Gomu Gomu no Kong Gun, but Luffy multiplies his arms, and applies it like a Gomu Gomu no Jet Gatling Gun.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no Kong Gatling
description: This attack is a Gomu Gomu no kong Gun, but is used in the same way as a Gomu Gomu no Jet Gatling Gun. This technique is made possible by Ryuo's recent mastery.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Bound Man
luffy_gear.description: The first time he used it was against the great privateer Doflamingo. And the second time he used it, he managed to activate it by sheer force of will, whereas he usually bites his wrist, and while controlled by Doflamingo's Parasite.

name: Gomu Gomu no Cannon Ball
description: The opponent's attack is absorbed and blocked by Luffy's stomach, then after a while, Luffy powerfully returns the attack like cannon fire.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Tank Man
luffy_gear.description: He uses it for the first time against Cracker, a technique very similar to Gomu Gomu no Fuusen.

name: Gomu Gomu no Jet Culverin
description: Faster version of the Gomu Gomu no Culverin in Boundman. Luffy compresses his fist, then releases it. He uses Python to make his fist follow his opponent's movements. The more his arm stretches, the faster he goes.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Snake Man
luffy_gear.description: It's not as imposing as the Boundman. However, it is much faster. First used against Katakuri in Mirror World

name: Gomu Gomu no Black Mamba
description: This technique is similar to the Gomu Gomu no Kong Organ in Boundman, but coupled with the Culverin, Luffy arches both arms back, compresses them and then releases them. Since there are several trajectories, the Black Mamba is more complicated to avoid.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Snake Man
luffy_gear.description: It's not as imposing as the Boundman. However, it is much faster. First used against Katakuri in Mirror World

name: Gomu Gomu no King Kobra
description: Larger version of Gomu Gomu no Jet Culverin. This attack is released after Luffy has compressed his fist into his forearm. Its trajectory circles Luffy to increase speed and power.

luffy_gear.name: Gear 4 / Gear Fourth : Snake Man
luffy_gear.description: It's not as imposing as the Boundman. However, it is much faster. First used against Katakuri in Mirror World

name: Robot Allié
description: Luffy wraps his arms and legs around his opponent to control him.

name: Robot Allié Punch
description: Luffy uses his opponent to throw a punch.

name: Robot Allié Kick
description: Luffy uses his opponent to kick other enemies.

name: Gomu Gomu no Hook
description: Luffy gives the enemy a powerful hook

name: Gomu Gomu no Flail
description: Luffy spins his arm in the air and brings it down on his opponent like a sledgehammer.

name: Gomu Gomu no Dawn Rocket
description: Gomu Gomu no Dawn Rocket

luffy_gear.name: Gear 5
luffy_gear.description: Awakened form
